overview: Zyro TV is a premium dark-themed streaming platform for shows and movies with neon purple accents. It features a Hulu-style layout, direct video uploads, subscription plans via IMVU credits, a full admin panel, user authentication, watchlist, search, and PWA support for adding to your home screen.
features: Hulu-style layout with hero banner and horizontal show rows
Direct single-file video uploads with progress tracking
Admin panel with live 10-second refresh for signups and subscriptions
Per-plan percentage-off discounts toggled in admin
Free vs subscription-only show access control with lock screens
Watchlist, watch history, and episode progress tracking
PWA support — add to home screen on iOS/Android
No likes or view counts visible anywhere
